stemHtml: The crew of a twin-turbofan aircraft are flying through heavy turbulence, when they observe increased EGT and fluctuations in thrust on one engine. What might this indicate?

options.a: Erroneous engine throttle inputs due to the turbulence.
options.b: Vibrations in the engine drive shafts due to the aeroplane being buffeted by the turbulence.
options.c: Engine compressor stall due to disrupted airflow into the engine intakes.
options.d: Reduced cooling and lubrication to the engines due to the oil flow being disrupted.
